ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the event starts */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the event starts */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or title of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the event ends */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the event ends */,
  "show_time_as" TEXT /* Display format of the event time (e.g., free, busy) */,
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event category */,
  "recurring" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the event is recurring */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of recurring events (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "recurring_end_date" TEXT /* End date of recurring events */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("event_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the reminder is set */,
  "reminder_on_off" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the reminder is active or not */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, SMS, in-app notification) */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being registered for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the event */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, organizer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
